thinking.text: The user has already applied for the Gold Rewards Card and is thanking me for my help. They mentioned they have a Rho-Bank+ subscription through their company, which satisfies the requirement. This seems like a natural conclusion to the conversation. I should acknowledge their application and offer any additional assistance if needed.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
That's great to hear! With your Rho-Bank+ subscription already in place, you're all set on the requirements side. 

Once your application is approved, you'll be able to start earning 2.5% cash back on all your everyday purchases right away. Don't forget that you can redeem your rewards once you reach the $15 minimum, and you'll also have access to virtual card management and purchase protection for 105 days up to $7,500 per claim.

If you have any questions about your application status or need help with anything else in the future, feel free to reach out. Best of luck with your new card! 🎉
